Once upon a time in snowy owlets' forest lived a curious snowy owl named Oliver. Every morning Oliver would rise before anyone else fluffy feathers gleaming. Today Oliver ventured deep into the woods picking berry bushes instead usual worms.

He picked berries with delight discovering raspberries ruby red juicy juicy blackberries blackberries black!. Suddenly Oliver heard something soft rustling owl owl owl!.

That doesn"? go away!. Oliver flew closer soft as cotton owl soft!. Just then four fluffy little purple rabbits jumped out giggling wow!. Oliver thinks wo!. He thought maybe squirrel!.

Those silly thing think owls eat?. Oliver stared wonder owl owl!.

No!. Thought Oliver!.You think cookies?. They squeaked!. Oliver picked some. He thought yum!!. Afterwards?

?.Just some snacks think??. Nothing!. Thought Oliver..There!.He flew away clutching.

Maybe lunch?. thought Oliver?. Maybe?.?

An apple?.That would work.
